originalTitle: Super Micro’s stock soars as its margins unexpectedly double
summary: The AI server maker now expects gross margins to be in the range of 15% to 17% thanks to an improving customer and product mix
content: The AI server maker now expects gross margins to be in the range of 15% to 17% thanks to an improving customer and product mix
chineseTitle: 超微股价飙升，利润率意外翻倍
chineseSummary: 由于客户和产品组合的改善，这家人工智能服务器制造商目前预计毛利率将在 15% 至 17% 之间
chineseContent: 由于客户和产品组合的改善，这家人工智能服务器制造商目前预计毛利率将在 15% 至 17% 之间
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
